hooks.command: file=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file" == *apps/web/src/* ]]; then echo "Running Angular unit tests for: $file"; pnpm --filter web test; fi
file=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file" == *apps/api/src/* ]]; then echo "Running NestJS unit tests for: $file"; pnpm --filter api test; fi
